decision.summary: Both the daily and weekly BTC slots are already filled, so there is no clean new edge to add.
decision.rationale: Beecthor's latest thesis still frames the broader move as corrective and favors watching for exhaustion rather than forcing fresh longs. The portfolio already has the weekly BTC $80k reach position open and the daily BTC $75k dip position open, so both allowed BTC price-hit slots are occupied. Neither position is near take-profit yet, there is no floor setup in context, and adding a third correlated BTC price-hit position would violate the slot discipline without improving the setup quality.
